ItacPersonItem.Notes: Appointed Bali` of Narni by Grand Duke Ferdinand I of Tuscany. The son of Sforza degli Oddi, he joined the Ricovrati in 1599. He is also mentioned as member of the Roman Academy of Maurizio di Savoia.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
